title: Bulby's Fakemon Pack
description: Fakemon mostly centered around programming langs
body:
# Bulby's Fakemon

Fakemon from my pack. NOTE: Most of these are way overtuned! Probably don't use on a serious SMP, as the final evolutions are busted.

Pokemon added:
* Haxe (Fire/Fighting)
* Haxette (Fire/Fighting)
* Skoil (Steel)
* Nekoil (Steel/Psychic)
* Ziskoil (Steel/Electric)

Evolutions:
* Haxe -> Haxette (level up)
* Skoil -> Nekoil (high friendship during the day) 
* Skoil -> Ziskoil (thunder stone)
